retrieved_result: What does the cli.exe file do? \"Home > Windows files > cli.exe What does the cli.exe file do? The cli.exe process is also known as CLI Application (Command Line Interface) or, as the case may be, ATI Catalyst Control Center and is a part of ATI Catalyst Control Center or, as the case may be, Catalyst Control Centre. Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the cli.exe Windows executable and ATI Catalyst Control Center, which has no relation to Docker or Docker setup for beginners.
